releaseNotes:
• In-Memory search now sorts results correctly across all pages — favourites and validated channels were previously skipped when they fell beyond the first page in cache order.
• Favouriting a channel, watching a channel, or running a stream scan now updates the in-memory search cache immediately without a full rebuild.
• Multi-view channel picker: the search box now uses a 200 ms debounce matching the main Live TV search. Clearing the search box restores the browse list instantly without any SQL. The fallback search method is now FTS AND, matching the app default.
• SQLite FTS index now only updates on channel name changes. Previously every favourite toggle, history write, or stream scan caused unnecessary FTS index churn.
• New composite index on the channels table speeds up the no-query Live TV browse and picker browse flows.
• Settings help text updated throughout: clearer defaults, ON/OFF trade-offs, and corrected descriptions. Safe Mode no longer incorrectly claims the search cache is rebuilt on toggle.
